violations.text: (Cheese) was observed held at (46) degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling.Per PIC, cheese was put in unit 30 min prior to inspection.Cheese was observed being stored in ice bath.PIC added more ice and water. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/26/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the (drive thru beverage counter ) have an accumulation of food residue and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 06/26/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the walk in cooler shelves and drive thru drink station counter have an accumulation of food residue and other debris. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/23/2024

The outside dumpster area observed with an accumulation of trash, litter, food, and/or other debris. Refuse areas must be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/23/2024

The floors in back kitchen area(floor drains included), dining room & drive thru drink station area have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 05/23/2024
